MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.n8n
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/n8n.py (69 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos n8n Integration.

"I can wire anything into anything! I'm the Professor!"

This module allows cosmos to trigger and monitor n8n workflows.

CLASSES:
- N8nProvider(ExternalProvider)
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Any
